signals.idea: Investigate why locking the generation pane at the bottom in tools/video-editor doesn't compress the editor to minimum space. The editor should shift up and take minimum space when the bottom pane is locked, similar to pressing the compressed button below the video. Trace the pane locking mechanism, bottom pane offset/height calculation, video editor layout response to locked bottom pane, and identify what's preventing compression.

resolved_flags.concern: Over-engineering: the plan adds a new calc-based height system in both `LayoutMainContent` and `Layout`, even though this layout already has a centralized bottom-offset path.
resolved_flags.resolution: Revised from v1 to address all four gate flags. Dropped Step 3 (Layout.tsx changes) entirely — wrong layer since GenerationsPane is position:fixed. Simplified the fix from introducing calc-based height in two layers to a two-line change: (1) remove the paddingBottom override for video editor in LayoutMainContent, (2) change h-screen to h-full in VideoEditorPage. Removed all references to raw generationsPaneHeight as a fallback. Added two new regression tests specifically covering the video editor shell branch in LayoutMainContent.test.tsx.

resolved_flags.concern: Step 3 targets the wrong layer: shrinking `Layout.tsx`'s outer wrapper is not what controls overlap with the generations pane.
resolved_flags.resolution: Revised from v1 to address all four gate flags. Dropped Step 3 (Layout.tsx changes) entirely — wrong layer since GenerationsPane is position:fixed. Simplified the fix from introducing calc-based height in two layers to a two-line change: (1) remove the paddingBottom override for video editor in LayoutMainContent, (2) change h-screen to h-full in VideoEditorPage. Removed all references to raw generationsPaneHeight as a fallback. Added two new regression tests specifically covering the video editor shell branch in LayoutMainContent.test.tsx.

resolved_flags.concern: The plan's suggestion to fall back to `generationsPaneHeight` as a simpler approximation is incorrect and can reintroduce overlap on constrained viewports.
resolved_flags.resolution: Revised from v1 to address all four gate flags. Dropped Step 3 (Layout.tsx changes) entirely — wrong layer since GenerationsPane is position:fixed. Removed all references to raw generationsPaneHeight as a fallback. Added two new regression tests specifically covering the video editor shell branch in LayoutMainContent.test.tsx.

resolved_flags.concern: The validation section only reruns existing tests, but the current suite does not cover the video-editor shell branch that the fix depends on.
resolved_flags.resolution: Revised from v1 to address all four gate flags. Dropped Step 3 (Layout.tsx changes) entirely — wrong layer since GenerationsPane is position:fixed. Simplified the fix from introducing calc-based height in two layers to a two-line change: (1) remove the paddingBottom override for video editor in LayoutMainContent, (2) change h-screen to h-full in VideoEditorPage. Removed all references to raw generationsPaneHeight as a fallback. Added two new regression tests specifically covering the video editor shell branch in LayoutMainContent.test.tsx.

signals.loop_summary: Iteration 2. Weighted score trajectory: 6.25 -> 0. Plan deltas: 87.2%. Recurring critiques: 0. Resolved flags: 4. Open significant flags: 0.

items: Locking the generations pane while on `/tools/video-editor?timeline=...` causes the full editor to shrink vertically, with the timeline and preview compressing to fit above the generations pane.
Unlocking the generations pane restores the editor to full viewport height.
The compression/expansion transition is smooth (300ms ease-smooth).
The compact editor pane (top) continues to work correctly — no regression.
New regression tests in `LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` cover the video-editor-shell + locked-generations-pane branch.
No z-index or overlap issues between the video editor and the generations pane.
